tasks.prompt: Write 5 original English sentences using Could.
tasks.hindiPrompt: Could का उपयोग करते हुए 5 नए वाक्य लिखिए।
tasks.sampleAnswer: I could swim when I was a child. Could you help me? He could run fast before. It could be true. Could I ask a question?

tasks.prompt: Write a short paragraph (5-6 lines) using Could.
tasks.hindiPrompt: Could का उपयोग करते हुए एक छोटा पैराग्राफ लिखिए।
tasks.sampleAnswer: I could not do this before. They could handle it before. Could you tell me again? It could rain. I could read this book.

tasks.prompt: Translate into English: "वह पहले गाना गा सकती थी।"
tasks.hindiPrompt: नीचे दिए गए वाक्य का अंग्रेज़ी अनुवाद करें।

tasks.prompt: Correct this sentence: "It coulds be true."
tasks.hindiPrompt: इस वाक्य में गलती ठीक कीजिए।

tasks.prompt: Write a short 4-line dialogue using Could.
tasks.hindiPrompt: Could का उपयोग करते हुए एक संवाद लिखिए।
tasks.sampleAnswer: We could work together before. This could be a mistake. Could you close the door? He could learn any language.
